Home.urgencyText: We're raising funds to support our first 50 students in Rio
Home.heroSubtitle: Your donation helps provide technology education, mentorship, and opportunities to young people in Rio de Janeiro's underserved communities.
Home.impactSubtitle: Every donation creates real change in Rio's communities
Home.problemSubtitle: Talent in Rio lacks access to technology education and career opportunities
Home.problemStat1Text: Of Rio youth lack tech training access
Home.problemStat3Text: Want tech careers but don't know where to start
Home.solutionSubtitle: We train + connect Rio's brightest youth with global tech opportunities
Home.solutionCol2Text: Link with investors and hiring companies
Home.tier1Desc: Funds one week of training materials
Home.tier2Desc: Supports a student for a full month
Home.tier3Desc: Launches a student into job readiness
Home.progressMoreNeeded: 38 more students need your support to launch their tech careers
Home.storyTitle: From Rio Favelas to Tech Innovation
Home.storyP1: Born and raised in Rio's communities, I saw firsthand how talent was everywhere but opportunity was not. The brightest minds in our favelas were building incredible things with nothing but determination and borrowed laptops.
Home.storyP2: TechMission Rio started with a simple belief: if we could connect Rio's untapped talent with global tech opportunities, we could transform not just individual lives, but entire communities.
Home.storyP3: Every student we support represents a promise fulfilled to the next generation of Rio innovators.
Home.storyMissionText: "Empowering Rio's youth to become the next generation of tech leaders, transforming their communities through innovation and opportunity."
Home.joinSubtitle: Get updates on student progress and see your impact in action
Home.joinSupportersText: Join 500+ supporters making a difference in Rio's tech community
Home.successSubtitle: Meet the students whose lives you've transformed
Home.joaoRole: Full Stack Developer at Mercado Livre
Home.joaoQuote: "TechMission Rio gave me the skills and confidence to land my dream job. Now I'm mentoring other students from my community."
Home.mariaQuote: "The mentorship program connected me with industry leaders who helped me build a portfolio that got me hired at one of Brazil's top fintech companies."
Home.robertoQuote: "The training and connections I received helped me launch my own edtech startup, now helping other students learn tech skills."
Home.readySubtitle: Your donation creates real opportunities for Rio's brightest minds

About.title: About TechMission Rio
About.subtitle: Empowering youth in Rio's favelas through technology education and Christian mentorship.
About.missionText: We aim to break cycles of poverty by equipping young leaders in Rio de Janeiro with high-demand tech skills and values-based guidance.
About.aboutSubtitle: TechMission Rio bridges the gap between underprivileged technical talent in Rio and B2B resources and mentorship in the US.
About.ourStoryP1: TechMission Rio was born from a vision to bridge technical education with spiritual growth. Recognizing the lack of laptops, hardware access, and coding guidance for youth in underserved favela neighborhoods in Rio de Janeiro, we dedicated our mission to establishing active classroom labs and direct mentorship support.
About.ourStoryP2: Our journey began with a small group of Christian tech professionals in the United States and Brazil, united by the calling to utilize their industry expertise for social impact. Over the past three years, we have graduated dozens of students, placing them in software engineering roles across Brazil.
About.scriptureQuote: "Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is—his good, pleasing and perfect will."
About.motivationText: We believe tech is a tool for stewardship. By training minds logically and encouraging spiritual growth in Christ, we prepare young people to lead their communities with high values.
About.pillarCodingDesc: Free technical software development classes for youth in favelas and local technical colleges.
About.pillarMeetupsDesc: Regular networking forums where ideas, mentors, local IT experts, and sponsors collide.
About.pillarOutreachDesc: Direct community assistance, equipment distribution, and physical classroom lab installations in Rio.
About.pillarFaithDesc: Valuing stewardship and human dignity. Open to everyone without judgment - sem julgamentos.
About.leadershipDesc: Our directors combine years of software development experience at top global tech brands with a deep personal calling for regional development and local church partnerships.
About.volunteersDesc: A network of bilingual technology professionals and educators from university BRASA chapters and US businesses dedicated to teaching coding and building bridges.
About.joinDesc: Every contribution directly funds laptops, coding instruction books, and virtual classroom operations for local schools.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introText: TechMission Rio (TMR) is committed to protecting the privacy of our student nominees, volunteer educators, and donors. This policy outlines how we collect, process, and store personal data in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados, Lei nº 13.709/2018) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
Privacy.collectText: We collect and process the following categories of personal information:
Privacy.collectStudent: Students: Full name, email address, campus location (FAETEC/IFRJ), current grade level, tech track focus recommendation, and financial/social justification details.
Privacy.collectEducator: Educators: Full name, teacher account email, and Firebase UID.
Privacy.collectDonor: Donors & Sponsors: Full name, transaction amount, billing currency, and email credentials logged via payment gateways (PayPal/Stripe). We do not store full credit card credentials.
Privacy.legalText: Under the LGPD, we process data based on:
Privacy.legalItem1: LGPD Art. 7 (VI): Exercise of regular rights in contract/process relations.
Privacy.legalItem2: LGPD Art. 8: Informed, explicit teacher/sponsor consent.
Privacy.legalItem3: LGPD Art. 14: Specific parental or legal guardian authorization for processing data of children and adolescents (minor consent).
Privacy.retentionText: We store personal data for as long as necessary for administrative compliance:
Privacy.retentionItem1: Approved Nominations: Retained for up to 3 years to measure long-term employment outcomes.
Privacy.retentionItem2: Archived/Rejected Nominations: Securely deleted from active files after 90 days.
Privacy.retentionItem3: Donor Transaction Records: Retained for 7 years for financial compliance and accounting audits.
Privacy.rightsText: You have the right to request access, correction, deletion, and revocation of consent for any personal records. Contact us at privacy@techmissionrio.org to submit requests.
Privacy.transferText: Student and educator records may be accessed by authorized US church sponsors (LGPD Art. 33) to coordinate virtual mentorships. Data servers (Google Cloud/Firebase) are located primarily in US and Brazil regions under strong security parameters.

Dashboard.adminControlCenterDesc: Manage global metrics, allocate budgets, and audit student admissions.
Dashboard.invitePreAccreditedDesc: Register a new candidate. The system will send a secure passwordless sign-in invitation directly to their email inbox.
Dashboard.inviteSuccess: Invitation email successfully transmitted to candidate! Profile pre-seeded in database.
Dashboard.metricsSuccess: Stats successfully updated in Cloud Firestore! Changes are now live on the public dashboard.
Dashboard.churchHubDesc: Welcome {orgName}! As an international organizational sponsor, you have access to exclusive collaboration systems:
Dashboard.prayerBoardDesc: Share monthly prayer requests or scriptures from your congregation. These are translated and displayed to your sponsored students in Rio.
Dashboard.liveExchangeDesc: Schedule a live Q&A session with your sponsored student cohort in Rio and your US youth group or missions committee.
Dashboard.rioMissionTripDesc: Is your church planning a mission trip? Register your dates here. TMR coordinates local service projects, computer lab visits, and joint tech camps with local churches in Rio.
Dashboard.cohortProgressDesc: View recent progress notes, coding achievements, and local testimonies of the 12 youth technical trainees sponsored by your church.
Dashboard.contributionHistoryDesc: Download official receipts for B2B financial accounting and 501(c)(3) deductions.
Dashboard.fellowControlCenterDesc: Manage your profile, portfolio links, and video pitch to show sponsors.
Dashboard.profileSuccess: Profile details successfully updated in Cloud Firestore! Changes are now live on the fellows directory.
Dashboard.noConversationActiveDesc: Select an active chat log from the left panel, or pick a fellow or mentor from the directory to start a secure dynamic connection.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Donors, partners, volunteers—this is the best place to start.
Contact.faqA1: Visit our Donate page for one-time or monthly giving options.
Contact.faqA2: Select 'Partnership' in the form and share your idea—we'll reply within 2–3 business days.
